selectedOption: Keep the built-in Demo local-only, read-only, outside Firebase, myTrips, and Offline Cache.
rationale: The boundary teaches features without creating user-owned or cloud state.
All synthetic independent analyses support explicit persistence isolation.
acceptedArguments: Protect App integration with persistence-negative tests.
rejectedAlternatives: Automatic Firebase room creation conflicts with the accepted Demo boundary.
Automatic myTrips insertion misrepresents the preview as a real trip.
risks: Future Clone Flow may blur the boundary.
Fixture consensus may be mistaken for live Agent output.
mitigations: Require explicit human approval for Clone Flow.
Enforce synthetic labels and execution-disabled assignments.
unresolvedQuestions: Future Clone Flow design remains outside this fixture.

evidence.claim: Demo persistence boundaries are accepted Project OS decisions.
